in_scope: T-017 theme toggle fix (included at user request): add @rendermode InteractiveServer to AppLayout.razor (or AppTopBar.razor + AppThemeToggle.razor); add the AppLayout_ThemeToggleWiringTests bUnit test that asserts the click handler is wired in the running app context

Empty routes: every route in Components/Pages/ reaches an AppEmptyState (or its data-owning equivalent); introduce AppEmptyRouteCard primitive only if the AppCard + AppEmptyState composition is repeated more than 3 times
Responsive matrix: the layout is usable at 1280x720, 1440x900, and 1920x1080; below 1280px the sidebar collapses to an icon rail; the top bar remains horizontal; the content area scrolls vertically
Accessibility audit: keyboard smoke test (Tab reachable, Enter activates, Escape closes); aria-current=page invariant; axe-core audit (registered, disabled per ADR-016 / M4-D)
Project-continuity state updates (current.md, task-board.md, session.json, tasks.json, milestones.json, capabilities.json, ROADMAP.md, handoffs/latest.md)
Single coherent commit feat(m2.5): add empty routes, responsive matrix, a11y audit, and theme toggle fix
out_of_scope: M2.6 (the M2 closeout and Treehouse dogfooding checkpoint)
axe-core activation (the harness is registered but disabled; the activation milestone is M4-D per ADR-016)
Mobile viewport support below 1280x720 (per ADR-005, the M2 primary viewport is 1280x720 minimum; the M8 closeout adds the full responsive matrix)
Pushing (no remote configured; push is skipped per the brief)

Then land the empty routes (AppEmptyRouteCard + per-page updates). Then the responsive matrix (AppResponsive + AppLayout update + docs/ui-principles.md § 10.1). Then closeout per Rule 15: update state, write the implementation report (with the T-017 fix in the Files Modified and Bug Fixes sections) and per-session handoff, create the coherent commit, stop. Do NOT begin M2.6.
session_notes: M2.5 implementation session (2026-07-11). The M2.5 plan was approved by the user on 2026-07-11 with the T-017 theme toggle bug fix included in the same slice. The session implements the M2.5 slice per the plan (.ai/plans/M2.5-empty-routes-responsive-accessibility.md) starting with the T-017 fix. The session follows the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; 13-step lifecycle; stop after the coherent commit. Push is skipped (no remote).

M2.4 implementation session. The M2.4 plan was approved by the user on 2026-07-11. The session implements the M2.4 slice per the plan (.ai/plans/M2.4-project-intelligence-dashboard.md). The session also addresses the theme toggle bug: the M2.3 AppThemeToggle's state must propagate to the documentElement.data-theme attribute so light/dark switching is visible immediately, persists across navigation and browser refresh, and remains consistent throughout the application. The session follows the Progressive Coding Rule: one task per session; 13-step lifecycle; stop after the coherent commit. The session does NOT implement M2.5 (only the M2.5 plan is promoted to Awaiting Approval). Push is skipped (no remote).
